function.message: I can’t complete this inbox request as written because it asks to OCR five purchase records, but only four requested source files are available in the workspace. Please provide the missing file (or correct the requested path), and I can proceed.
function.rulebook_notes: Per inbox workflow, complete the request only when supported by available canonical files; per outcome rules, do not silently deliver a partial result when a listed file is missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction in /00_inbox/724_next-task.md explicitly lists five OCR targets. Four targets were successfully read, while the remaining listed target was not present in /50_finance/purchases (confirmed by direct read failure and follow-up filename search). Completing only four would be an incomplete result, so clarification is required.
completed_steps_laconic: read missing requested purchase path (not found)
